chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-986 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 14.10.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General along with Inspector Naveed Akhtar Prizada on behalf of SSP Ghotki and Ali Raza Balouch, Senior Auditor, District Accounts office, Ghotki..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Zubair Ahmed Kalwar, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners and request and adjournment on the ground that latter is out of station. The compliance report, along with certain documents has been filed on behalf of District Accounts officer and is taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided the counsel holding brief. The Senior Auditor, Ali Raza Balouch is present and submits that grievances of the petitioners have been redressed and the salary of the petitioner has also been regularized. In view of the above, the petition is hereby disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
